description: Detects memory leak indicators in C: malloc/calloc/realloc/strdup/fopen calls that may not have corresponding free/fclose. Simplified from Rust per D-09: flags allocation calls broadly without verifying corresponding free/fclose. Languages field scoped to c only to avoid conflict with other language-specific memory_leak_indicators pipelines sharing the same pipeline name.

flag.message: Function call detected -- verify malloc(), calloc(), realloc(), strdup(), strndup(), asprintf(), and fopen() calls have corresponding free()/fclose() to prevent memory and resource leaks
